actionable_ideas: Simplify the login process by re-evaluating the necessity of selfies for authentication
Improve customer support by training representatives to efficiently resolve issues without requiring unnecessary documentation like screen recordings
Enhance the app's technical stability to prevent errors and improve overall user experience
